understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem marked '+' by falling through passages in the correct gravity direction, efficiently completing each level and ultimately winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Primary movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each move, the player falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x), which opens new fall paths. Gravity alternates between UP/DOWN across sections. Spikes instantly kill. Corridor scan and landing predictions help identify passage columns. Each attempt is limited to 50 turns.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem marked '+' by falling through passages in the correct gravity direction, efficiently completing each level and ultimately winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Primary movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each move, the player falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x), which opens new fall paths. Gravity alternates between UP/DOWN across sections. Spikes instantly kill. Corridor scan and landing predictions help identify passage columns. Each attempt is limited to 50 turns.
